title: Caron_HOT273_SCOPE
author: David A. Caron
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset was collected aboard Hawaii Ocean Time-series cruise 273 in June 2015. Samples contain a collection of size fractions including whole seawater, 200µm, 80µm, 5µm, & 0.7µm. Total RNA was extracted from a filter. RNA was reverse transcribed to cDNA. cDNA product was PCR amplified using 18S-V4 primers.
steps_raw: This dataset was collected aboard Hawaii Ocean Time-series cruise 273 in June 2015. Samples contain a collection of size fractions including whole seawater, 200µm, 80µm, 5µm, & 0.7µm. Total RNA was extracted from a filter. RNA was reverse transcribed to cDNA. cDNA product was PCR amplified using 18S-V4 primers.
